title: Zombified negates other AL increases

card.rawText: Equipped creature loses 2 AL per turn cycle. Creature's AL returns to normal if this card is removed from the field. Negates other AL increases on the equipped creature.

plan.title: Zombified negates other AL increases
plan.summary: Equip a positive AL card and Zombified to the same creature, then verify the AL increase is suppressed while Zombified's AL loss is active.

notes: Pre-place Hero Shield on player_1 field so it supplies a competing +4 AL increase.
Equip Zombified to the same player_1 primary creature.

steps: Attach Hero Shield and Zombified to player_1 primary creature.
Read the equipped creature's effective AL.

expectedAssertions.label: Positive AL increase is suppressed and Zombified AL loss applies
Hero Shield remains as competing AL source

manualVerification: Confirm Zombified suppresses only positive AL increases.
Confirm 120-E01 timing separately; current static layer model applies the printed -2 AL while equipped.
riskNotes: Because all while-equipped text is active on the card, the expected AL includes the current -2 AL layer plus suppression of Hero Shield's +4 AL.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
